sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86671" key="proapoplhro/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαπο-πληρόω</orth>, <sense id="n86671.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">block up beforehand,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰς εἰσβολὰς καὶ τὰς διόδους</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
